security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Local model loader and GPU tray controller
bundle.longDescription: PC-first tray controller for local inference servers, model loading, endpoint copy actions, and GPU pressure monitoring.
